target.title: fix(agent): surface non_deliverable_terminal_turn with a specific retry message
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

When turns end with `stop_reason: tool_use` without a deliverable reply
(`non_deliverable_terminal_turn`), users previously saw a generic "/new"
fallback message that was misleading — retry usually resolves this
transient error.

This adds a specific warning message advising users to retry the same
message first, and only fall back to `/new` or a lighter model if it
persists.

Related to #94176

## Changes

- **`src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-failure-copy.ts`** — added
  `NON_DELIVERABLE_TERMINAL_TURN_FAILURE_TEXT` with retry-first guidance,
  `NON_DELIVERABLE_TERMINAL_TURN_REASON` constant, and
  `resolveExternalRunFailureTextForTerminalError` resolver function
- **`src/auto-reply/reply/agent-lifecycle-terminal.ts`** — added
  `terminalError` to the deferred terminal metadata keys so the value
  propagates through lifecycle events
- **`src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/types.ts`** — added optional
  `terminalError` field to `EmbeddedAgentRunMeta`

## Evidence

- Pure additive change — new constants and optional type fields with no
  behavioral change to existing code paths
- Follows the same resolver pattern used for heartbeat failure copy
